anxious.acknowledgment: God, I feel anxious and uncertain.

scriptures.text: Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.
Fear not, for I am with you.

anxious.reframe: God is present even when I feel uncertain.

ashamed.acknowledgment: God, I feel shame about what I have done.

scriptures.text: There is therefore now no condemnation for those who are in Christ Jesus.

overwhelmed.acknowledgment: God, I feel overwhelmed and small.

scriptures.text: Lead me to the rock that is higher than I.

overwhelmed.reframe: God lifts me beyond my limits.

grateful.acknowledgment: God, I am thankful for what you have provided.
grateful.reframe: Gratitude trains my heart toward God.
